title: Tambacounda Heat Wave
lead: Tambacounda is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +6.20. This event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Tambacounda has led to extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 20.7 GG. 
 The low humidity of 31% and moderate wind speed of 13.6 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the high CDD value signifies a significant cooling demand.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of this critical heat wave.
